scores.notes: Major issues include missing header information (EX-19.1, Exhibit 19.1), incomplete sentences in scope section, missing text about 'not available to the public', numerous spacing errors throughout (e.g., 'collectivelyreferred', 'non-publicinformation'), incorrect numbering (two 'ii.' items instead of 'iii.'), and poor layout preservation with content appearing out of order. The document structure is partially maintained but reading flow is disrupted.
